title: Brentuximab Vedotin Injection: MedlinePlus Drug Information
text:
sleep or staying asleep anxiety dry skin hair loss night sweats joint, bone, muscle, back, arm, or leg pain muscle spasms Some side effects can be serious. If you experience any of these symptoms or those listed in the IMPORTANT WARNING section, call your doctor immediately: 
numbness, burning, or tingling in the hands, arms, feet, or legs; or muscle weakness peeling or blistering skin or rash fever, chills, nausea, vomiting, confusion, shortness of breath, seizures, irregular heartbeat, dark or cloudy urine, unusual tiredness, or muscle or joint pain new or worsening cough or shortness of breath decreased urination; swelling of the hands, feet, ankles, or lower legs; fatigue fever; chills; cough; difficult, painful, or frequent urination; or other signs of infection ongoing pain that begins in the stomach area but may spread to the back, nausea, or vomiting pale skin, unusual tiredness or weakness, shortness of breath, or dizziness yellowing of the skin or eyes, lack of energy, pain or discomfort in the right upper stomach area, dark urine, light-colored bowel movements, nausea, vomiting, or itching stomach pain, black and tarry stools, blood in stools, vomit that is bloody or looks like coffee grounds unusual bleeding or bruising, small red or purple spots in skin, or blood in urine, Brentuximab vedotin injection may cause other side effects. Call your doctor if you have any
